user.title: Connect to Finance Manager
user.description: Enter the addon URL and integration token. Set the token in the addon settings under 'integration_token'.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the addon. Check the URL.
error.invalid_token: Invalid token. Check the token in the addon settings.

sync_transactions.name: Sync transactions
sync_transactions.description: Fetches new transactions from all linked bank connections.
